sql_array: SET use_hive_partitioning = 1; CREATE TABLE test_table (_date Date, _country String, _code Int) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY _date;
SET use_hive_partitioning = 1; INSERT INTO test_table VALUES ('2021-01-15', 'Netherlands', 42);
SET use_hive_partitioning = 1; UPDATE test_table SET _country = 'Germany' WHERE _date = '2021-01-15' AND _code = 42;
SET use_hive_partitioning = 1; SELECT _date, _country FROM url('http://data/path/date=*/country=*/code=*/*.parquet') WHERE _date < '2022-01-01' AND _country LIKE 'N%';
SET use_hive_partitioning = 1; SELECT COUNT(*) FROM url('http://data/path/date=*/country=*/code=*/*.parquet') WHERE _country IN ('Netherlands', 'Germany') AND _code > 40;
